mapper.select: select b.bed_no, b.status, b.bed_id from bed b where b.room_id = #{roomId} and b.del_flag = '0' order by b.bed_no
select b.bed_no, b.status from bed b, room r where b.room_id = r.room_id and r.room_no = #{roomNumber} and r.building = #{building} and b.del_flag = '0' and b.status = 'free' order by b.bed_no

select b.bed_no, b.status, b.room_id, br.usage_start_date, br.bed_record_id, br.usage_end_date, br.history , r.building, r.room_no, c.customer_name, c.gender from bed b, bed_record br, room r, customer c where b.room_id = r.room_id and br.bed_id = b.bed_id and br.customer_id = c.customer_id and c.customer_name like '%${customerName}%' and br.usage_start_date = #{checkInDate} and br.history = #{history} and br.del_flag = '0' and ( br.history != '1' or ( b.del_flag = '0' and r.del_flag = '0' and c.del_flag = '0' ) ) order by c.customer_id desc

select b.bed_no, b.status, b.room_id, br.usage_start_date, br.bed_record_id, br.usage_end_date, br.history , r.building, r.room_no, c.customer_name, c.gender from bed b, bed_record br, room r, customer c where b.room_id = r.room_id and br.bed_id = b.bed_id and br.customer_id = c.customer_id and c.customer_name like '%${customerName}%' and br.history = #{history} and br.del_flag = '0' and ( br.history != '1' or ( b.del_flag = '0' and r.del_flag = '0' and c.del_flag = '0' ) ) order by b.bed_id
select distinct r.room_no, r.floor from room r, bed b where r.del_flag = '0' and b.del_flag = '0' and b.room_id = r.room_id and b.status = 'free' and r.building = #{building} order by r.room_no
